title: thymus serpyllum f. orbicularis
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. orbicularis, also known as creeping thyme or orbicular creeping thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant that is characterized by its small, rounded leaves and spreading habit. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Thymus serpyllum f. orbicularis can be attributed to its high content of essential oils, particularly thymol and carvacrol, which provide anti-inflammatory and antioxidant benefits. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
